data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: YouTube uses a microservices architecture to manage various functionalities like video serving, recommendations, and user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Polyglot frameworks with RESTful APIs for inter-service communication.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Utilizes CDNs to efficiently deliver video content across the globe.
data.technical_spec: Akamai and Edge computing principles for latency reduction.

data.title: Data Processing Pipelines
data.description: Real-time and batch processing for video processing, analytics, and recommendation systems.

data.title: Scalable Storage Solutions
data.description: Massive storage systems to handle a vast amount of video data uploaded daily.
data.technical_spec: Distributed storage systems with redundancy and auto-scaling capabilities.

data.title: Machine Learning Models
data.description: Used extensively for content recommendation and ad targeting.
data.technical_spec: TensorFlow models optimized for large-scale deployment.
